legal.to_the_extent_permitted_by_law_our: To the extent permitted by law, our total liability for claims arising out of or relating to the Platform will not exceed the greater of: (a) the amount you paid us, if any, in the twelve months before the claim, or (b) one hundred U.S. dollars (USD $100).
legal.to_the_maximum_extent_permitted_by: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vibez Citizens and its operators, affiliates, licensors, service providers, officers, employees, and agents will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for any loss of profits, revenue, goodwill, data, business opportunities, or reputation arising out of or related to:

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vibez Citizens disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, availability, accuracy, and reliability.

legal.vibez_citizens_we_us_or_our_operat: Vibez Citizens (“we,” “us,” or “our”) operates a digital platform that allows citizens to create profiles, share content, communicate with others, discover businesses and services, manage business listings, submit bookings, publish reviews, and access related social and marketplace features.
legal.vibez_citizens_does_not_independen: Vibez Citizens does not independently guarantee the identity, licensing, qualifications, legality, quality, safety, pricing, or performance of businesses or services listed on the Platform.
legal.vibez_citizens_is_a_digital_platfo: Vibez Citizens is a digital platform that allows citizens to create profiles, share content, communicate with others, discover local businesses and service providers, manage business listings known as VPORTs, make booking requests, publish reviews, and access related social and marketplace features.
legal.vibez_citizens_is_a_platform_provi: Vibez Citizens is a platform provider, not the provider of the underlying goods or services offered by third parties;
legal.vibez_citizens_is_not_responsible_: Vibez Citizens is not responsible for missed appointments, service disputes, quality issues, cancellations, pricing disputes, or no-show claims between citizens and providers.
Vibez Citizens is not responsible for the performance or independent actions of third-party providers except as required by law.
legal.vibez_citizens_may_allow_users_and: Vibez Citizens may allow citizens and businesses to create public listings, advertise services, publish menus, publish rates, display availability, and receive inquiries or booking requests.
legal.vibez_citizens_may_enforce_moderat: Vibez Citizens may enforce moderation rules on private or semi-private communications when reasonably necessary for safety, abuse prevention, legal compliance, fraud investigation, platform integrity, or responding to reports.
legal.vibez_citizens_may_but_is_not_obli: Vibez Citizens may, but is not obligated to, monitor, investigate, review, moderate, remove, restrict, or disable content, listings, vox, reviews, accounts, or access to the Platform.
professional.walking_distance_but_noisy_: Walking distance but noisy on weekends. Parking garage felt safe. Utilities included.
